raw_question_text:
<image>Caption:
The departure of the winter-mean streamfunction at 500 mb from the 10-winter average for (a) 1982/83 and (b) 1984/85. CI $=5\times10^{\cdot4}$ equivalentto $2.9\bar{6}\times10^{6}\;\mathrm{m}^{2}\;\mathrm{s}^{-1}$ Solid (dash) curves for positive (negative) values. Dot curve is the zero contour.
Question:
What feature is indicated by the dotted contour?
extraction_notes: heuristic_field_extraction

raw_question_text:
<image>Caption:
0 a  Results of the cell-by-cell simulation of the woody material transportation and deposition volumes. The  red colours  show the volume of deposited driftwood, the  blue colours  show the volume of passing driftwood at each cell. The maximum values are calculated at the outﬂow cell.  b  Results of the object-oriented simulation of the deposition of woody material. The  red dots  show the centre of gravity of the deposited model wood logs
Question:
Where are maximum deposition volumes calculated in panel (a)?
extraction_notes: heuristic_field_extraction
